name: Abu Bakr ibn Aqeel
title: Loyal Nephew
shortDescription: Son of Aqeel ibn Abi Talib and one of the Bani Hashem youth who sacrificed his life defending the Master of Martyrs (AS).
fullStory:
Abu Bakr ibn Aqeel ibn Abi Talib was one of the brave youth (or teenagers) of Aqeel's family. His mother was an umm-walad.

After the Karbala event, Aqeel's family was considered one of the families with the most martyrs among the Bani Hashem (offering 9 martyrs). On Ashura, after the martyrdom of his brothers and cousins, Abu Bakr bravely rushed to the battlefield.

While reciting poetry defending the righteousness of the Prophet's family, he engaged with the massive Kufan army and, after a valiant fight, was finally martyred by Ubaydullah ibn Tamimi.

His name is mentioned in the Ziyarat al-Nahiya al-Muqaddasa: 'Peace be upon Abu Bakr ibn Aqeel ibn Abi Talib'.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ عَقِيلِ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Nahiya:) Peace be upon Abu Bakr ibn Aqeel ibn Abi Talib...
